config.radioactive-before-prismatic.name: Radioactive Before Prismatic
config.radioactive-before-prismatic.tool: Place Radioactive at upgrade level 6 and Prismatic at upgrade level 7. Upgrade effects remain assigned to their existing levels; only the tier names, textures, materials, recipes, and progression order are swapped.
config.highest-tier-sprinkler-acts-as-sc: Treat the level 7 sprinkler like a Scarecrow, whether that tier is Radioactive or Prismatic.

objects.middle-tier-sprinkler.descriptio: Waters the 120 surrounding tiles every morning.
objects.highest-tier-sprinkler.descripti: Waters the 224 surrounding tiles every morning. It can also protect crops like a Scarecrow.
